parameters.jsCode:
// Receives enriched + scored appointment from No-Show Scoring Engine
// Generates appointment_id if not provided, sets status, cleans for MongoDB
const i = $input.first().json;

const apt_id = i.appointment_id || ('APT-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,7).toUpperCase());

return [{json: {
  appointment_id:      apt_id,
  patient_id:          i.patient_id          || null,
  patient_name:        i.patient_name         || 'Unknown',
  patient_phone:       i.patient_phone        || null,
  doctor_id:           i.doctor_id            || null,
  clinic_name:         i.clinic_name          || 'Doctome Clinic',
  specialty:           i.specialty            || 'General Practice',
  wilaya:              i.wilaya               || '',
  appointment_date:    i.appointment_date     || null,
  appointment_hour:    Number(i.appointment_hour) || 10,
  booked_date:         i.booked_date          || new Date().toISOString(),
  status:              'scheduled',
  // Patient snapshot fields
  age:                 Number(i.age)          || null,
  gender:              i.gender               || null,
  distance_km:         Number(i.distance_km)  || null,
  payment_type:        i.payment_type         || 'Cash',
  prior_no_shows:      Number(i.prior_no_shows) || 0,
  prior_visits:        Number(i.prior_visits)   || 0,
  is_first_visit:      Number(i.is_first_visit) || 0,
  reminder_sent:       i.reminder_sent === true || i.reminder_sent === 'true',
  reminder_2h_sent:    false,
  // Enrichment
  weather:             i.weather              || 'Clear',
  temperature_c:       i.temperature_c        || null,
  lead_days:           Number(i.lead_days)    || 0,
  day_of_week:         Number(i.day_of_week)  || 0,
  // Scoring results
  no_show_probability: i.no_show_probability  || null,
  risk_level:          i.risk_level           || 'LOW',
  risk_emoji:          i.risk_emoji           || '🟢',
  action:              i.action               || 'No action needed',
  top_risk_drivers:    i.top_risk_drivers     || [],
  scored_at:           i.scored_at            || new Date().toISOString(),
  // Confirmation
  patient_confirmed:   null,
  patient_declined:    false,
  reschedule_offer_sent: false,
  // Timestamps
  created_at:          new Date().toISOString(),
  updated_at:          new Date().toISOString()
}}];

const a = $input.first().json;
return [{json:{
  user_id:        a.doctor_id || 'staff',   // SSE target
  patient_id:     a.patient_id,
  patient_name:   a.patient_name,
  appointment_id: a.appointment_id,
  type:           'high_risk_appointment',
  risk_level:     a.risk_level,
  no_show_probability: a.no_show_probability,
  top_risk_drivers: a.top_risk_drivers,
  appointment_date: a.appointment_date,
  specialty:      a.specialty,
  action:         a.action,
  timestamp:      new Date().toISOString(),
  message: `🔴 High no-show risk (${Math.round(a.no_show_probability*100)}%) for ${a.patient_name} on ${a.appointment_date}`
}}];
return [{json:{...$input.first().json,note:'Medium risk – reminder scheduled'}}];
return [{json:{...$input.first().json,note:'Low risk – no action'}}];

parameters.responseBody:
✅ Confirmed!

Thank you. We'll see you at your appointment. 🏥

❌ Appointment Cancelled

Your appointment has been noted as cancelled. We hope to see you soon.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'no_high_risk_appointments_in_2h', ts: new Date().toISOString() } }];

nodes.name: Notify Patients of Slot Offer → MongoDB

parameters.responseBody:
✅ Reschedule Confirmed!

You have been rescheduled to the new slot. See you there! 🏥

⚠️ Slot Already Taken

Sorry, this slot was just taken by another patient. Please contact the clinic for alternatives.

👍 Got it!

You have declined this offer. No changes were made to your appointment.
